clean_headline: Aditya Birla Sun Life AMC approved changes in senior management personnel.
raw_headline: We are submitting herewith reply to the clarification on significant increase in the volume of securities of the Company.

clean_headline: Central Bank of India enters into co-lending partnership with IIFL Finance Limited for competitive loan offerings.
raw_headline:
The Exchange has sought clarification from Shakti Pumps India Ltd on March 12, 2026, with reference to Movement in Volume.

The reply is awaited.
